prompt: Mobile-only treatment menu cards for a Japanese cosmetic surgery clinic (すず美容形成外科, Hiroshima). White x pale pink (#f78da7) x charcoal design. 3 treatment option cards stacked vertically, each card showing: numbered badge (01/02/03), cut-no-cut badge label, treatment name in bold Japanese, downtime indicator bar, 3 bullet points of ideal candidates, and campaign price with strikethrough original price + 50% OFF badge. Clean premium medical aesthetic. Cards should be easy to scan, well-spaced, with clear visual hierarchy. No images needed.
previewError: Preview rendering requires puppeteer. Install it in the repo or alongside @aidesigner/agent-skills.
